channel.title: AP News - US News
channel.description: Top US News stories from AP News

item.title: Lindsey Graham’s journey from a pool hall to the heights of political power
item.description: Lindsey Graham was the garrulous son of South Carolina pool hall owners and he rose to become a prominent senator and fixture on the global stage.

item.title: Support for Israel is less important for younger Jewish Americans, AP-NORC poll finds
Is there such a thing as being too old to execute? Aging death row inmates are set to die in Florida
